text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Nope: 
http://qat.tecnik93.com//logs/7-STABLE-FPT-NPD/ircd-ratbox-devel-3.0.4.log; 
On QATy it builds its own sqlite because it can't find installed one 
(custom LOCALBASE). Always check the port status on QAT or Pointy and 
compare the build logs when fixing QATty-reported problems.
